plugins.photosPermission: Allow ThreatTrack to choose evidence photos for incident reports.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ThreatTrack to take evidence photos for incident reports.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ThreatTrack uses the camera to take evidence photos for incident reports.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ThreatTrack uses your photo library to attach evidence photos to incident reports.
